title: fix: keep api key dialog scroll inside modal
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: No more escaping modals
gist.blurb: Fixed a sneaky bug on mobile where swiping through API key permissions would scroll the whole page behind it. The scroll is now safely contained.
gist.summary: Updated the API key dialog to bound vertical scrolling within the modal body, preventing background page scrolling on mobile devices.
gist.impact: Mobile users can now smoothly scroll through permissions and model lists without the background page shifting around.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about keeping a scrolling list contained inside a modal. Visually, this can be represented by Polly the bee neatly packing a long, unruly scroll (representing the permissions list) into a sturdy, contained box.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot neatly packing a long, glowing scroll of code into a small lime green (#ecf874) box. The round tan nomnom creature watches happily. Soft pastel gradient background with warm lighting. Chunky retro sprites, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and contained.
